Lighthouse CI now runs (mobile, median of 3) via lighthouserc.json + a required ci.yml job; CLS + resource/third-party budgets are hard errors, LCP/TTI/TBT are warnings (cold next-start on CI inflates timing; production LCP 1530ms, CLS 0.001 by direct measurement). The 0.33 CLS breach was single-run variance, not a user shift; fixed with median-of-3 + min-height on .cs-header-actions. continue-on-error dropped: gate is required on the stable assertions.

@vercel/speed-insights + @vercel/analytics installed and mounted in app/layout.tsx (via the Vercel install PRs). The anticipated @vercel/* vs Vitest/Vite peer conflict no longer reproduces - clean npm install succeeds with no .npmrc, vitest still runs (37 tests). Shipped; recorded that no .npmrc is needed.

Field CWV monitoring live: <SpeedInsights/> mounted in layout collects real-user LCP/CLS/INP from every route, distinct from Lighthouse-CI. Dashboard trend accrues with traffic (Vercel side). Shipped at the integration level.

scripts/check-asset-size.mjs + scripts/asset-budget.json guard public assets (per-image/GLB caps + total) and built client JS total; npm run check:assets; wired into CI build job after next build. Deterministic, no flake. Current public 95KB / client JS 2286KB within budget. Bump maxGlbKB when the Lumi GLB lands.

GenieStatusAnnouncer.tsx sr-only role=status aria-live region mirrors Lumi state (thinking/responding), localised; localised <noscript> describes the decorative scene; canvas stays aria-hidden. Covers the canvas DOM-text mirror + noscript + decorative marking.

Five Liquid Glass materials (whisper/light/standard/heavy/solid) as --cs-glass-* tokens with .cs-surface-* classes; collapse to solid under @supports-not, prefers-reduced-transparency, forced-colors, and now @media print (added). All tokenized, no brand hex outside token blocks. build rc=0.

APCA-W3 0.1.9 core (scripts/apca.mjs) validated by tests/apca.test.ts vs reference values; scripts/check-apca.mjs (npm run check:apca) measures text-on-surface incl composited glass, flags body<75 / interactive<90. Caught + fixed dark muted text (Lc 63->79 via --cs-color-fg-muted #dcd2c3); flagged ochre button Lc 66 vs strict 90 as a brand decision (WCAG AA ok). Local guard, not CI-blocking.

components/ui/{Button,Card,Field,Select,Dialog}.tsx - token-styled markup (cs-btn*, glass/surface, cs-field), no external dep; Dialog is a modal with focus trap + Escape + focus restore; Field/Select native + aria-invalid/describedby/alert. tests/ui-primitives.test.ts renders each + axe. Adoption left incremental (identical markup = drop-in). tsc/vitest 52/lint/build green.

GenieScene reads NEXT_PUBLIC_LUMI_GLB, calls useGLTF.preload at module scope (only evaluated via CanvasMount dynamic ssr:false -> gated, no mobile/reduced-motion fetch); Lumi inside Suspense fallback=null so the SSR poster paints first; GlbBoundary (in-canvas React error boundary) falls back to procedural LumiPlaceholder on a rejected GLB load with no throw/blank canvas. Build-verified default + GLB-set. tsc/vitest 52/lint/build green.

@next/bundle-analyzer (ANALYZE-gated) + npm run analyze emit per-chunk treemaps; analyzer-proven the 3D stack (three/r3f/gsap, ~304KB gz) is code-split into async chunks absent from the 176KB first load via CanvasMount dynamic ssr:false; docs/perf/bundle-audit.md records first-load + 3D chunk tables and totals for regression comparison against check:assets. All 3 acceptance criteria met. Default build unchanged.

served-route axe gate (scripts/axe-routes.mjs) proven green on x86_64 CI run 28089290130 - all 5 routes (en,vi,work,careers,case) clean at serious/critical with real Chrome incl color-contrast; flipped from continue-on-error advisory to required build-failing gate. All 4 acceptance criteria met. Component-level jsdom check (tests/axe.test.ts) remains alongside.

Premium motion-polish layer shipped: aurora (hero+contact, both themes), kinetic masked hero headline + 0-100%-clamped gold shimmer (aria-label keeps the slogan as the H1 name), custom cursor/spotlight + magnetic CTAs + card tilt (fine-pointer + hover + motion-allowed only, live media-query detach), once-per-session intro veil (inline-script armed, reduced-motion/no-JS never see it, CSS forwards fill guarantees dismissal), bilingual keyword marquee, gold scroll progress, masked heading reveals, link underlines + button shine + selection. Transform/opacity-only (CLS-safe), no new deps. Gate: tsc/60 vitest/lint/build 26 pages/check:assets (2363KB<2800KB)/served-route jsdom axe 0 violations en+vi all green; visual QA both reduced + motion-on rounds; shimmer coverage bug found+fixed pre-push.

Space Grotesk via next/font/google with explicit latin+vietnamese subsets (build-verified: next/font errors on missing subsets), self-hosted woff2 (~35KB, inside the 120KB hard font budget), display:swap + size-adjusted fallback. Fixes the operator-reported VN font bug (old system-serif stack had no VN diacritics -> per-glyph fallback mixing). Scale stays tokenized; grotesk display tuning h1 700/-0.03em. Both acceptance criteria met: VN slogan + stacked-diacritic headings render in one face (puppeteer /vi shots), sizes read --cs-text-* tokens.

Dark-default + gold HUD art direction on top of TASK-DS-011: blueprint hero grid, mono coordinates row, ghost section indices (silent counter pseudo), orbiting conic card borders (@property, static fallback), gilded final slogan word per theme, tilted marquee, scrolled-header gold hairline, breathing hero CTA. Full VN copy rewrite (dictionaries+site+sections+metadata), brand-exact slogan casing, SocialProof duplicate-heading fix. Gate green: tsc/60 vitest/lint/build 26pp 175kB shared/assets 2364KB/jsdom axe 0 en+vi on the dark default; visual QA dark+light+vi.

Lumi is now a living mascot: the live canvas rides above the opaque sections (cs-canvas-live z-30, pointer-events none) so the genie flies a measured full-page route (journey.ts, 10 unit tests; fixed camera + deterministic viewportToWorld), banks into turns, trails light, carries its own pixie dust, bursts magic at section arrivals/hover/chat/wish-granted (LeadForm event), attends the chat panel while open, and IS the chat entry via a focusable core-sized hotspot (opens chat - proven by an automated click probe chatOpen:true). Poster path + mobile untouched; SSR untouched (axe 0 en+vi); First Load JS unchanged 175kB (all mascot code in the async 3D chunk). Gate tsc/70 vitest/lint/build/assets/axe green. Also uncovered that the old headless-shell screenshot harness NEVER rendered WebGL - fixed with new headless + ANGLE so 3D is verifiable from now on.

Every home section now has its own beat on top of the shared reveals: trust stat pop+ignition, story node ignition on the drawn line, levitating value cards, services reveal scan, process circuit + sequential index charge, work HUD brackets, proof paper tilt, FAQ breathe + rotating marker, careers aurora. All transform/opacity/paint-only, reduced-motion/scripting-none/print/forced-colors guarded; one shows-only observer drives three data-attributes. Gate green (74 tests, axe 0 en+vi).

Lumi-first conversion: deterministic keyless wish flow in the chat (pure state machine + 4 unit tests, shared leadSchema validation, explicit consent, quick-reply chips) POSTing the exact /api/lead payload and celebrating via the mascot burst - PROVEN end-to-end by an automated probe (mascot click -> flow -> real 200 -> success bubble). Contact section leads with a Grant-it-with-Lumi launcher, classic form folds to a native details fallback (no-JS safe); duplicate Talk-to-Lumi CTAs hide under html[data-lumi-live] with a one-time click-me hint; header entry stays for a11y constancy. TASK-CHAR-026 adaptive qualification deliberately still planned (down-payment noted).
